decisions.summary: Use Bun + TypeScript strict for project baseline.
Use branch-per-change workflow with review before merge.

project.summary: Short project background for AGENTS.md Project Context.

notes: Copy this file to intake/manifest.json and replace placeholders with run-specific input.
Use schemaVersion=2 only. Legacy version=1 manifests are not supported.
Use absolute paths for provider roots and target project path.
documents.path, decisions.sourcePaths, and project.projectSkillBlueprints[].sourcePaths default to target.projectPath when present.
Set pathBase to manifest when a document path should stay relative to the intake file directory.
